title: searchResponse
description: Response object containing the results of a search request

took.description: Time taken to execute the search

timed_out.description: Indicates whether the search operation timed out

aggregations.description: Aggregated search results grouped by the specified criteria

max_score.description: Maximum score among the matched documents

total_relation.description: Indicates whether the total number of hits is accurate or an estimate

hits.description: Array of hit objects, each representing a matched document
Object containing the search hits, which represent the documents that matched the query.

profile.description: Profile information about the search execution, if profiling is enabled

scroll.description: Scroll token to be used fo pagination

warning.description: Warnings encountered during the search operation
